sources.title: Anthropic Software Engineer Salary | Levels.fyi
sources.note: Only generic SWE title data available; no embedded/hardware/firmware title listed for Anthropic or OpenAI.

sources.title: Anthropic Salary 2026 total comp breakdown (aggregator)
sources.note: Reports Anthropic engineer total comp $300K-$759K median ~$443K for general SWE — useful only as an upper-bound sanity check, not a direct embedded/IoT anchor.

sources.title: Anthropic Salaries | Levels.fyi
sources.note: Aggregate page has no hardware/embedded/firmware title breakout as of this search.

sources.title: Google Hardware Engineer Salary | Levels.fyi
sources.note: L3 (Hardware Engineer II) total $204K, base $139K, equity $46K/yr, bonus $19.6K.

sources.title: Apple Firmware Engineer Salary | Levels.fyi
sources.note: ICT3 median total ~$228K, directionally consistent (Apple premium).

sources.title: Tesla Embedded Systems Software Engineer Salary | Levels.fyi
sources.note: P1 median total $179K, range $125K-$201K — brackets dataset's L3 total of $163K.

sources.title: Tesla Software Engineer Salary | Levels.fyi
sources.note: P3 general SWE median $264K — not embedded-specific, weak proxy only.

sources.title: Tesla Salaries | Levels.fyi
sources.note: No Staff-level embedded systems breakout available.

sources.title: Anduril Industries Software Engineer Salary | Levels.fyi
sources.note: L3 total $206K vs dataset's $158K — single-company signal that dataset may be a bit low for well-funded growth-stage private, but not enough for a confidence upgrade alone.

sources.title: Embedded Engineer Salary | Glassdoor
sources.note: All-company-size average $164,609 (25th $129,647 / 75th $212,076) — order-of-magnitude consistent with dataset but not startup-stage-specific.

sources.title: IoT and Embedded Systems Salary | Glassdoor
sources.note: Average $137,274 — broad market blend, not early-stage-specific.

sources.title: Embedded Software Engineer Salary | Glassdoor
sources.note: Average $172,613, range $140,658-$214,867 — blended across all company sizes/stages, not early-stage- or level-specific.

sources.title: IoT Engineer Salary Guide | MentorCruise
sources.note: Reports median IoT engineer $95K, senior $135K — generic title blend, well below dataset's early-stage L5 band and not company-stage-specific; too weak/inconsistent to use as an anchor.
